requirement_topic.en: Photobiological safety — NS/IEC 62471 blue light / optical radiation vs China GB/T 20145
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——NS/IEC 62471 蓝光/光辐射 vs 中国 GB/T 20145
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——NS/IEC 62471 藍光/光輻射 vs 中國 GB/T 20145

summary.en: Photobiological safety of lamps and luminaires — the assessment of optical radiation hazards including blue light retinal hazard — is assessed against IEC 62471 (photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which NBSM can adopt as an NS reference where applied. The standard classifies products into Risk Groups (Exempt, RG1, RG2, RG3) based on emission and viewing conditions. In Nepal this is applied through the NBSM conformity scheme where the product is in mandatory scope, or via procurement specifications, rather than as a standalone consumer-labelling mandate equivalent to the EU's blue-light-hazard packaging label. Exporters should confirm with NBSM and the in-country importer whether an IEC 62471 photobiological test report and risk-group classification is required for the specific LED product.
summary.zh: 灯及灯具的光生物安全——包括蓝光视网膜危害在内的光辐射危害评估——依据 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估，NBSM 在采用时可将其作为 NS 引用。该标准依发射和观看条件将产品分为危害组（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。在尼泊尔，这在产品处于强制范围时通过 NBSM 合格评定方案施加，或通过采购规范施加，而非作为等同于欧盟蓝光危害包装标签的独立消费者标识强制要求。出口商应与 NBSM 及在地进口商确认具体 LED 产品是否需要 IEC 62471 光生物检测报告及危害组分类。
summary.zht: 燈及燈具的光生物安全——包括藍光視網膜危害在內的光輻射危害評估——依據 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估，NBSM 在採用時可將其作為 NS 引用。該標準依發射和觀看條件將產品分為危害組（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。在尼泊爾，這在產品處於強制範圍時通過 NBSM 合格評定方案施加，或通過採購規範施加，而非作為等同於歐盟藍光危害包裝標籤的獨立消費者標識強制要求。出口商應與 NBSM 及在地進口商確認具體 LED 產品是否需要 IEC 62471 光生物檢測報告及危害組分類。

standards_or_laws: NS/IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (adopted by NBSM where applied)
IEC 62471 Risk Group classification (Exempt / RG1 / RG2 / RG3) — applied via NBSM conformity scheme or procurement specs

summary.en: China assesses photobiological safety of lamps through GB/T 20145 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), the GB transposition of CIE S 009 / IEC 62471, using the same Risk Group classification. For luminaires, GB 7000.1 (general safety requirements) references blue light hazard provisions, and CCC implementation rules for LED products in scope incorporate relevant photobiological safety requirements. China's technical basis for blue light / optical radiation hazard assessment is therefore aligned with the IEC 62471 framework that Nepal draws on.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 20145（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估灯的光生物安全，该标准为 CIE S 009 / IEC 62471 的 GB 转化，采用相同的危害组分类。对于灯具，GB 7000.1（一般安全要求）引用蓝光危害条款，范围内 LED 产品的 CCC 实施规则纳入相关光生物安全要求。因此中国蓝光/光辐射危害评估的技术基础与尼泊尔所依据的 IEC 62471 框架一致。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 20145（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估燈的光生物安全，該標準為 CIE S 009 / IEC 62471 的 GB 轉化，採用相同的危害組分類。對於燈具，GB 7000.1（一般安全要求）引用藍光危害條款，範圍內 LED 產品的 CCC 實施規則納入相關光生物安全要求。因此中國藍光/光輻射危害評估的技術基礎與尼泊爾所依據的 IEC 62471 框架一致。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (China, transposes IEC 62471 / CIE S 009)
GB 7000.1 — Luminaires general requirements and tests (references blue light hazard provisions, within CCC scope)

gap.en: The technical basis is aligned — both China (GB/T 20145) and Nepal (NS/IEC 62471) use the IEC 62471 Risk Group framework — so a product already assessed under GB/T 20145 has a directly comparable photobiological dossier. The gap is institutional and procedural: China's assessment sits within GB/CCC, which Nepal does not recognise, and in Nepal photobiological safety is applied via the NBSM conformity scheme or procurement specifications rather than a standalone blue-light-hazard consumer-label mandate like the EU's. The exporter cannot rely on the CCC certificate as Nepal-side evidence; an IEC 62471 test report and risk-group classification acceptable to NBSM / the importer may be needed, but whether it is mandatory depends on the product's NBSM scope and channel.
gap.zh: 技术基础一致——中国（GB/T 20145）和尼泊尔（NS/IEC 62471）都采用 IEC 62471 危害组框架——故已按 GB/T 20145 评估的产品具有直接可比的光生物档案。差距是制度性和程序性的：中国的评估处于 GB/CCC 之内，而尼泊尔不予认可；在尼泊尔，光生物安全通过 NBSM 合格评定方案或采购规范施加，而非像欧盟那样的独立蓝光危害消费者标签强制要求。出口商不能依赖 CCC 证书作为尼泊尔端证据；可能需要一份为 NBSM/进口商所接受的 IEC 62471 检测报告及危害组分类，但其是否强制取决于产品的 NBSM 范围及渠道。
gap.zht: 技術基礎一致——中國（GB/T 20145）和尼泊爾（NS/IEC 62471）都採用 IEC 62471 危害組框架——故已按 GB/T 20145 評估的產品具有直接可比的光生物檔案。差距是制度性和程序性的：中國的評估處於 GB/CCC 之內，而尼泊爾不予認可；在尼泊爾，光生物安全通過 NBSM 合格評定方案或採購規範施加，而非像歐盟那樣的獨立藍光危害消費者標籤強制要求。出口商不能依賴 CCC 證書作為尼泊爾端證據；可能需要一份為 NBSM/進口商所接受的 IEC 62471 檢測報告及危害組分類，但其是否強制取決於產品的 NBSM 範圍及渠道。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — photobiological safety per NS/IEC 62471 applied via NBSM conformity scheme or procurement specs where in scope; no standalone EU-style blue-light-hazard consumer-label mandate; confirm with NBSM and importer
mandatory_status.cn: Effectively required (in scope) — GB/T 20145 photobiological safety and GB 7000.1 blue light provisions apply within CCC for LED products in scope in China

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological (blue light / optical radiation) safety for LED products in Nepal is assessed against NS/IEC 62471 using the same Risk Group framework as China's GB/T 20145, so the technical dossier is directly comparable. Nepal has no standalone EU-style blue-light-hazard consumer-label mandate; the requirement is applied via the NBSM conformity scheme or procurement specifications. The Chinese CCC certificate is not Nepal-side evidence — an IEC 62471 report acceptable to NBSM / the importer may be required. Confirm scope with NBSM.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔 LED 产品的光生物（蓝光/光辐射）安全依据 NS/IEC 62471 评估，采用与中国 GB/T 20145 相同的危害组框架，故技术档案直接可比。尼泊尔无独立的欧盟式蓝光危害消费者标签强制要求；该要求通过 NBSM 合格评定方案或采购规范施加。中国 CCC 证书不构成尼泊尔端证据——可能需要一份为 NBSM/进口商所接受的 IEC 62471 报告。请与 NBSM 确认范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾 LED 產品的光生物（藍光/光輻射）安全依據 NS/IEC 62471 評估，採用與中國 GB/T 20145 相同的危害組框架，故技術檔案直接可比。尼泊爾無獨立的歐盟式藍光危害消費者標籤強制要求；該要求通過 NBSM 合格評定方案或採購規範施加。中國 CCC 證書不構成尼泊爾端證據——可能需要一份為 NBSM/進口商所接受的 IEC 62471 報告。請與 NBSM 確認範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Flicker, glare and lighting quality — IEC/NS references vs China GB/T 31831
requirement_topic.zh: 频闪、眩光与照明质量——IEC/NS 引用 vs 中国 GB/T 31831
requirement_topic.zht: 頻閃、眩光與照明質量——IEC/NS 引用 vs 中國 GB/T 31831

summary.en: Beyond hard optical-radiation hazard, lighting quality attributes — temporal light modulation (flicker / stroboscopic effect), glare, colour rendering, and colour consistency — affect visual comfort and are increasingly addressed in IEC performance standards (e.g. IEC TR 61547-1 and IEC 63158 for stroboscopic effect, IEC standards on LED module / lamp performance). In Nepal these quality attributes are not generally enforced as a standalone mandatory market-access gate; they enter mainly through NBSM-adopted NS performance standards where they exist, or through procurement / tender specifications (public lighting and institutional buyers may specify flicker and CRI limits). Exporters supplying tenders should request the specific lighting-quality criteria from the buyer, since these can exceed any baseline NS requirement.
summary.zh: 除硬性光辐射危害外，照明质量属性——时间光调制（频闪/频闪效应）、眩光、显色和颜色一致性——影响视觉舒适度，并日益在 IEC 性能标准中得到处理（如 IEC TR 61547-1 和 IEC 63158 针对频闪效应、IEC 关于 LED 模块/灯性能的标准）。在尼泊尔，这些质量属性通常不作为独立的强制市场准入门槛执行；它们主要通过 NBSM 采用的（存在时的）NS 性能标准，或通过采购/招标规范进入（公共照明和机构买家可能规定频闪和显色限值）。供应招标的出口商应向买家索取具体照明质量标准，因为这些可能超出任何基线 NS 要求。
summary.zht: 除硬性光輻射危害外，照明質量屬性——時間光調制（頻閃/頻閃效應）、眩光、顯色和顏色一致性——影響視覺舒適度，並日益在 IEC 性能標準中得到處理（如 IEC TR 61547-1 和 IEC 63158 針對頻閃效應、IEC 關於 LED 模塊/燈性能的標準）。在尼泊爾，這些質量屬性通常不作為獨立的強制市場准入門檻執行；它們主要通過 NBSM 採用的（存在時的）NS 性能標準，或通過採購/招標規範進入（公共照明和機構買家可能規定頻閃和顯色限值）。供應招標的出口商應向買家索取具體照明質量標準，因為這些可能超出任何基線 NS 要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC performance references for temporal light modulation / stroboscopic effect (e.g. IEC TR 61547-1, IEC 63158) — adopted via NS where applied
NBSM NS performance standards and Nepal procurement / tender lighting-quality specifications (flicker, glare, CRI) where invoked

summary.en: China has more developed lighting-quality instruments. GB/T 31831 (Specifications of LED indoor lighting application) and related GB/T performance standards address illuminance, colour rendering (Ra), colour temperature, and uniformity; flicker / stroboscopic effect is addressed in GB/T performance and measurement standards and in the GB 7000 / GB 30255 safety-and-efficiency framework. These provide a relatively detailed domestic baseline for LED lighting quality, used in both product specification and procurement.
summary.zh: 中国有更成熟的照明质量工具。GB/T 31831（LED 室内照明应用技术要求）及相关 GB/T 性能标准处理照度、显色（Ra）、色温和均匀度；频闪/频闪效应在 GB/T 性能与测量标准及 GB 7000 / GB 30255 安全与能效框架中处理。这些为 LED 照明质量提供了相对详细的国内基线，用于产品规格和采购两方面。
summary.zht: 中國有更成熟的照明質量工具。GB/T 31831（LED 室內照明應用技術要求）及相關 GB/T 性能標準處理照度、顯色（Ra）、色溫和均勻度；頻閃/頻閃效應在 GB/T 性能與測量標準及 GB 7000 / GB 30255 安全與能效框架中處理。這些為 LED 照明質量提供了相對詳細的國內基線，用於產品規格和採購兩方面。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 31831 — Specifications of LED indoor lighting application (China — illuminance, CRI, colour temperature, uniformity)
GB/T LED performance and stroboscopic-effect measurement standards (China)

gap.en: Lighting-quality requirements (flicker, glare, CRI, colour consistency) are not a standalone mandatory market-access gate in Nepal the way GB/T 31831 forms a detailed domestic baseline in China. In Nepal these attributes surface mainly through any NBSM-adopted NS performance standard and, importantly, through buyer / tender specifications — public lighting and institutional procurement can specify flicker and CRI limits that exceed any baseline. The practical exporter implication: a product engineered to China's GB/T 31831 lighting-quality baseline is generally well-positioned, but the exporter must read each Nepal tender's lighting-quality clauses individually rather than assume a single national threshold, and cannot rely on Chinese GB/T conformity as automatic Nepal-side acceptance.
gap.zh: 照明质量要求（频闪、眩光、显色、颜色一致性）在尼泊尔不像 GB/T 31831 在中国构成详细国内基线那样作为独立的强制市场准入门槛。在尼泊尔，这些属性主要通过任何 NBSM 采用的 NS 性能标准，并且重要的是通过买家/招标规范浮现——公共照明和机构采购可能规定超出任何基线的频闪和显色限值。对出口商的实际含义是：按中国 GB/T 31831 照明质量基线设计的产品通常处于有利位置，但出口商须逐一研读每个尼泊尔招标的照明质量条款，而非假定单一国家阈值，且不能依赖中国 GB/T 合规作为尼泊尔端的自动接受。
gap.zht: 照明質量要求（頻閃、眩光、顯色、顏色一致性）在尼泊爾不像 GB/T 31831 在中國構成詳細國內基線那樣作為獨立的強制市場准入門檻。在尼泊爾，這些屬性主要通過任何 NBSM 採用的 NS 性能標準，並且重要的是通過買家/招標規範浮現——公共照明和機構採購可能規定超出任何基線的頻閃和顯色限值。對出口商的實際含義是：按中國 GB/T 31831 照明質量基線設計的產品通常處於有利位置，但出口商須逐一研讀每個尼泊爾招標的照明質量條款，而非假定單一國家閾值，且不能依賴中國 GB/T 合規作為尼泊爾端的自動接受。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / buyer-driven — lighting-quality criteria (flicker, glare, CRI) not a standalone national gate; arise via NBSM-adopted NS performance standards where they exist and via Nepal tender / procurement specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Baseline (domestic) — GB/T 31831 and related GB/T performance standards provide a detailed domestic LED lighting-quality baseline used in specification and procurement

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lighting-quality attributes (flicker / stroboscopic effect, glare, CRI, colour consistency) are not a standalone mandatory market-access gate in Nepal; they arise through NBSM-adopted NS performance standards where they exist and, most often, through buyer / tender specifications. A product designed to China's GB/T 31831 baseline is generally well-positioned, but the exporter must read each Nepal tender's lighting-quality clauses individually and cannot treat Chinese GB/T conformity as automatic Nepal-side acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 照明质量属性（频闪/频闪效应、眩光、显色、颜色一致性）在尼泊尔不是独立的强制市场准入门槛；它们通过 NBSM 采用的（存在时的）NS 性能标准，并且最常通过买家/招标规范浮现。按中国 GB/T 31831 基线设计的产品通常处于有利位置，但出口商须逐一研读每个尼泊尔招标的照明质量条款，且不能将中国 GB/T 合规视为尼泊尔端的自动接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 照明質量屬性（頻閃/頻閃效應、眩光、顯色、顏色一致性）在尼泊爾不是獨立的強制市場准入門檻；它們通過 NBSM 採用的（存在時的）NS 性能標準，並且最常通過買家/招標規範浮現。按中國 GB/T 31831 基線設計的產品通常處於有利位置，但出口商須逐一研讀每個尼泊爾招標的照明質量條款，且不能將中國 GB/T 合規視為尼泊爾端的自動接受。
